name: Participant Onboarding v1
description: WhatsApp chatbot for Superlikers contest participant onboarding flow

nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives WhatsApp GET verification and POST message webhooks. Responses are emitted by Respond to Webhook nodes.

nodes.name: Message Parser
nodes.notes: Normalizes incoming WhatsApp payload into a standard format. Handles both GET verification and POST message processing. Extracts phone, message_type, message_body, media_id, is_media, timestamp from WhatsApp Cloud API format.

nodes.name: State Router
nodes.notes: Routes messages by session.state. Output 0=START, 1=WAIT_PHONE, 2=WAIT_NAME, 3=WAIT_EMAIL, 4=WAIT_CONFIRMATION, 5=SEARCH_PARTICIPANT, 6=REGISTER_PARTICIPANT, 7=WAIT_TICKET, 8=UPLOAD_TICKET, 9=PROCESS_INVOICE, 10=REGISTER_PURCHASE, 11=ACCEPT_ENTRY, 12=FINISHED, 13=ERROR, 14=default (unrecognized state).

nodes.name: Welcome Handler
nodes.notes: Handles START state: sends welcome message, transitions session state to WAIT_PHONE, resets retry_count. Routes to Session Update after processing.

nodes.name: Phone Validator
nodes.notes: Strips non-numeric chars from input, validates exactly 10 digits (Colombia), normalizes with +57 prefix. Two outputs: output 0=valid (routes to Search Participant), output 1=invalid (routes to Session Update for error reply). COUNTRY_CODE and PHONE_DIGITS configurable via env vars.

nodes.name: Search Participant
nodes.notes: Official Postman contract: GET /participants/search with Authorization: Bearer api_key and JSON body {api_key,campaign,query:{cellphone,state}}. Search by cellphone depends on campaign signup-field mapping.

nodes.name: Participant Exists
nodes.notes: Branches on HTTP response status from Search Participant. Output 0=200 (found → store participant data, state=WAIT_TICKET). Output 1=404 (not found → state=WAIT_NAME, ask for name). Output 2=fallback (error handling for 4xx/5xx/timeout).

nodes.name: Session Update
nodes.notes: Persists session transitions and handles official Superlikers response shapes: participant search/create, /photos, /retail/buy, /entries/accept, and 422 duplicate image/factura errors.

nodes.name: Message Builder
nodes.notes: Builds outbound WhatsApp text payload. Verification/status messages are not sent to WhatsApp and are answered by Respond to Webhook.

nodes.name: Name Handler
nodes.notes: Captures user's name. Validates: min 3 chars, only letters and spaces. Output 0=valid (name_captured, WAIT_EMAIL), Output 1=invalid (stay WAIT_NAME, error reply).

nodes.name: Email Validator
nodes.notes: Validates email format. Output 0=valid (email_captured, WAIT_CONFIRMATION with name+email summary), Output 1=invalid (stay WAIT_EMAIL, error reply).

nodes.name: Confirmation Handler
nodes.notes: Parses user confirmation (Sí/No). Output 0=Sí (REGISTER_PARTICIPANT), Output 1=No (reset to WAIT_NAME, clear name+email), Output 2=fallback (stay WAIT_CONFIRMATION, retry).

nodes.name: Register Participant
nodes.notes: Official Postman contract: POST /participants with {api_key,campaign,properties,active,verified_cellphone,verified_email,not_send_verify_registration}. distinct_id is the participant email in this challenge.

nodes.name: Registration Result
nodes.notes: Routes participant registration. Output 0=200 success (official docs), output 1=>=400 API error, output 2=fallback.

nodes.name: WAIT_TICKET Router
nodes.notes: Routes WAIT_TICKET messages. Output 0=image (proceed to upload). Output 1=fallback (text, re-prompt user to send a photo).

nodes.name: Download WhatsApp Media
nodes.notes: Downloads ticket image binary from WhatsApp Cloud API using media_id. Response is binary (file format) passed directly to Upload node. WHATSAPP_TOKEN must be configured.

nodes.name: Image Size Validator
nodes.notes: Valida que la imagen no exceda 10MB según la especificación del challenge

nodes.name: Upload Ticket API
nodes.notes: Official Postman contract: POST /photos multipart/form-data with api_key,campaign,distinct_id,upload_photo,title/category. Duplicate image returns 422 with “Sha1 is already taken”.

nodes.name: Upload Result
nodes.notes:
Routes upload result. Output 0=200 (ok, store photo_id -> UPLOAD_TICKET). Output 1=4xx/5xx (error, retry/re-prompt). Output 2=fallback (network error).
TODO: Agregar manejo de 'Sha1 is already taken' y 'ref already taken'

nodes.name: Process Invoice
nodes.notes: Sends the ticket image to OpenAI Vision and expects JSON compatible with Superlikers /retail/buy: {legible, ref, products[].ref, products[].price, products[].quantity, provider?, line?}.

nodes.name: Invoice Validator
nodes.notes: Validates OCR output for /retail/buy: legible=true, ref present, products[] with ref/price/quantity, confidence >= 0.7.

nodes.name: Register Purchase
nodes.notes: Official Postman contract: POST /retail/buy with {api_key,campaign,distinct_id,ref,products[]}. Response 200 contains invoice.points and participant point summary.

nodes.name: Purchase Result
nodes.notes:
Routes /retail/buy result. Output 0=200 success, output 1=>=400 duplicate/validation/API error, output 2=fallback.
TODO: Agregar manejo de 'Sha1 is already taken' y 'ref already taken'

nodes.name: Accept Entry
nodes.notes: Official Postman contract: POST /entries/accept with {api_key,campaign,id}, where id is the UploadPhoto entry/activity id returned by /photos (or recovered from response data). Watch for execution_error in the response body.

nodes.name: Entry Result
nodes.notes: Routes entry acceptance result. Output 0=200 (ok → Points Builder). Output 1=fallback (error → ERROR).

nodes.name: Points Builder
nodes.notes: Builds final WhatsApp text using /retail/buy invoice.points and participant point summary; /entries/accept only confirms moderation state in official docs.

nodes.name: Format Log Entry
nodes.notes: Formats a 7-field log entry from session data for observability logging. Fields: conversation_id, phone, email, invoice_ref, points, status, timestamp.

nodes.name: Log to Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends a log entry row to Google Sheets. Runs with onError=continueRegularOutput so logging failures never block the main flow.

nodes.name: Rename Binary
nodes.notes: Renames WhatsApp binary file to upload_photo, the official Superlikers /photos multipart field.

nodes.name: Should Send WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Routes normal user replies to WhatsApp Cloud API and verification/status payloads directly to webhook response.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Sends outbound text through WhatsApp Cloud API. Requires WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID and WHATSAPP_TOKEN.

nodes.name: Respond Webhook OK
nodes.notes: Returns 200 JSON after outbound WhatsApp send so Meta does not retry the webhook.
